overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a rural dirt path through open grasslands with scattered trees and utility poles, then turning off into the wilderness. The scene features cinematic game engine graphics with dynamic cloud lighting and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road through grassland with utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: tall wooden power pole with crossbars and wires running along the left side of the path
muddy dirt path with tire tracks winding through the grassland
electrical wires connecting the series of utility poles
large gray rock formations scattered throughout the grassy field
tall evergreen trees scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open grassland under a partly cloudy sky. Wooden utility poles with power lines run parallel to the path on the left, while scattered boulders and pine trees dot the landscape. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the rural wilderness.

events.description: character turns left off the dirt path and begins walking through tall grass

agents.ego_description: turning left off the dirt trail and walking through the grassy field away from the path

entered.detail: small pine tree that the character passes closely while walking through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt trail and turns left into the open grassland. The utility poles and power lines recede into the background as the character walks through tall grass, passing a small pine tree on the left. The terrain remains open with scattered boulders visible in the distance under the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured rural trail into the untamed expanse of an open grassland. It begins by tracking behind a character walking along a dirt path, flanked by wooden utility poles and power lines that stretch parallel to the route. As the character moves forward, the landscape is dotted with scattered boulders and pine trees under a partly cloudy sky. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the trail and turns left, causing the utility poles to recede into the background. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the wilderness, passing a small pine tree while moving through tall grass toward a distant, open horizon.
